title: A New Dance Show Based on a TV Series
summary: Russell T Davies, who made a TV show called It's A Sin, is working with the Pet Shop Boys to turn it into a dance production. The TV show was about gay men and their friends during the HIV and AIDS crisis in the 1980s and 1990s. The new stage show will be an immersive performance with dance and visuals. It will premiere in Manchester at Aviva Studios, but the exact date is not yet known. Davies and the Pet Shop Boys are excited to tell this important story in a new way. The show will use music and movement to share emotions and history with the audience.

background_read: It's A Sin is a TV show made by Russell T Davies that aired in 2021. It tells the story of gay men and their friends living in the UK during the 1980s and 1990s, when many people were affected by HIV and AIDS. The show was very popular and won awards. Now, Davies is teaming up with the Pet Shop Boys, a famous pop duo, to create a dance version of this story. They want to use movement and music to help people understand this important part of history in a new and emotional way.
Article_Structure: WHO: Russell T Davies and the Pet Shop Boys
WHAT: Adapting the TV show It's A Sin into a dance production
WHERE: Premiering at Aviva Studios in Manchester
WHY: To tell an important story about the HIV and AIDS crisis in a new, immersive way

perspectives.description: Turning a TV drama into a dance show to reach new audiences and express emotions differently
